title: Uruguayan-Style Chivito Steaks
description: Grilled steaks served with a Uruguayan twist, topped with chimichurri sauce and served with steamed vegetables.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan steaks
ingredients.notes: Look for ribeye or strip loin cuts

ingredients.name: Steamed asparagus
ingredients.notes: Trim ends and tie into bundles

instructions: Season steaks with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Grill steaks for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Let steaks rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Meanwhile, make chimichurri sauce by combining parsley, garlic, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Drizzle chimichurri sauce over steaks and serve with steamed asparagus and broccoli.
Top steaks with charred red onion and serve immediately.
